decisions.summary: TRD 0.3 complete: Planner agent extended with 5-field consumption + testing-strategy.md routing + constraint enforcement. All 6 greps pass. Closes SC-3, SC-6.
ROADMAP.md mutation is regex-only: never YAML-parse, line-level match-and-replace preserves non-TRD content
Idempotency via correct-state guards: emit change only when current state differs from target
No auto-uncheck on missing SUMMARY: [x] without SUMMARY left alone; orphan_warning only when TRD file also missing
09-02: objective_num preserved verbatim from ROADMAP header regex capture; rollup co-emits with rule changes in same reconcile call

_fetchDupDetectLog propagates readFileSync errors so aggregate routes to warnings[]; gh._runGh exported as wrapper function for injection hook; buildCheckTodosFixtures auth mock puts Token scopes in stdout

readCheckTodosCache/writeCheckTodosCache/isCheckTodosCacheStale route through _runFs (not bare fs) — injection-hook consistent with obj 4/5; realFs extended in-place with writeFileSync+mkdirSync; cached:true only when zero sources re-fetched
formatCheckTodosMarkdown sub-renderers stay private; only public formatter exported to preserve clean API boundary
Token bound is warn-not-truncate: appends footer when output > 8000 chars; never slices string mid-entry
Surface count locked at 20 (not 19): 2 public + 5 fetchers + 1 lane + 3 cache + 4 hooks + 5 constants = 20 entries. CONTEXT.md claimed 19 but recount corrected.
SKILL.md REWRITE: /devflow:check-todos now delegates to df-tools check-todos $ARGUMENTS (thin-orchestrator); legacy workflows/check-todos.md preserved for df-tools list-todos.
Snapshots written manually after visual ANSI inspection; never auto-regenerated (mirrors obj 1 cassette discipline)
_sanitize() replaces ESC byte with '?' in user-supplied text to prevent ANSI injection from branch names/org titles
no_color contract: strips FG color codes only (\x1b[3xm); BOLD/DIM/RESET structural escapes preserved
tui-cli.cjs: idempotent _cleanup via _cleaned guard; non-TTY auto-fallback on !isTTY; hand-rolled key dispatch; --raw implies --once in parser
EX1 passed at RED (08-01/08-02 produced exact 7-entry surface); EX3 banner-absent was the true RED gate for TRD 08-03
SKILL_PATH path math corrected: 3 ups from lib/ (not 4) to reach plugins/devflow/skills/; used ../../../skills/tui/SKILL.md
subagent_type=general-purpose is correct ONLY for workflow invocations (Task prompt='Run /devflow:<skill> ...'); all agent-class work must use a dedicated df-* agent
Single atomic commit for all 6 workflow files: uniform mechanical subagent_type replacements, no behavioral divergence between files
Convention established: general-purpose is correct ONLY for Task(prompt='Run /devflow:...') workflow-invocation trampolines; all other spawns use dedicated df-* agents
Placed verifier Task spawn at top of build.md § 8 (before display branches) as backstop for guaranteed VERIFICATION.md production, mirroring execute-objective.md:512-524 pattern exactly
Preserved general-purpose trampoline at build.md:167 per Phase E DOCUMENT case preservation decision
Task-level tdd attribute (tdd="true") preferred over TRD-level type:tdd; resolveEffectiveTddFlag: task attr wins, type:tdd back-compat, default false
output() helper always exits 0 — use process.stdout.write + process.exit(1) directly for error paths needing non-zero exit
routeSkill is PURE — returns object, no fs/exit/console; CLI wrappers handle side effects
Argument validation (null skill/args) runs BEFORE skill lookup to prevent spurious unknown-skill errors
Export-lock banner (8-entry surface LOCKED by TRD 12-01); EX1 test enforces atomically
All 4 SKILL files (consolidated + 3 redirects) committed in single atomic commit to prevent routing gaps
I2 survey returned drop (0% decimal usage / 16 projects / 120 objectives); decimal handling removed from objective.cjs, insert deprecated
I4: summary template canonicalized to templates/summary.md; 3 variant files deleted; cmdTemplateSelect simplified
gaps subcommand maps to plan-milestone-gaps.md — user-facing alias is cleaner but workflow filename is plan-milestone-gaps
Default subcommand via null in subcommands[]: status with no arg → progress.md (not error)
_normalizeStatusSubcommand is private (not exported); export-lock stays at 8 entries
resume-work skill maps to resume-project.md workflow (not resume-work.md)
DEPRECATION_MAP unchanged for workstreams TRD — no sibling skill dirs ever existed, so no deprecation entries needed
workstreams run subcommand is a stub (workstreams-run.md) locked for v1.2 obj 6 Phase A — informs user, exits 0, no mutation
help.md main catalog uses only 5 consolidated skill forms; 13 old names isolated to deprecation appendix table
Phase A handoff JSON snapshot committed in 12-RESEARCH.md for v1.2 obj 6 classify-session.js to bootstrap routing table
Token savings proxy measurement: description-field delta −130 tokens; full ≥1500 target deferred to Phase A empirical verification

research-tooling.md merge: project-researcher narrative tool_strategy + objective-researcher compact table as quick-reference; source_hierarchy from objective-researcher only; project-researcher verification_protocol kept as canonical
TRD 03: Collapsed <tool_strategy>+<verification_protocol> into single <research_tooling> wrapper matching objective-researcher.md pattern from TRD 02
TRD 03: project-researcher COMPARISON.md + FEASIBILITY.md templates removed from output_formats (no on-disk counterparts); flagged for TRD 04
debugger.md Option B: 4 debugging sections collapsed to single <debugging_methods> wrapper with @~/.claude/devflow/references/debugging-methods.md reference

verifier.md VERIFICATION.md inline kept (path 3): inline has re_verification/gaps/human_verification frontmatter fields absent from on-disk verification-report.md template — substantively different intents
Quality gate 25k tokens interpreted as cumulative across /devflow:build invocations; single-invocation cut is ~7002 tokens, threshold crossed at 6+ builds
COMPARISON.md + FEASIBILITY.md inline templates in project-researcher have no on-disk counterparts — accepted as known gap, format guidance preserved in execution_flow
route-intent Q&A skip-rule excludes 'what' — What's our progress? is a fire prompt for the status rule
route-intent debug regex uses {0,3} optional-adjective slot for 'Fix the login bug' pattern
subprocess-based integration tests for CLI handlers that call process.exit
pid in .skill-active marker is df-tools subprocess PID (diagnostic only)
output() called with JSON.stringify(result) as 3rd arg to produce JSON in --raw mode
gate-edits.js: strict DENY by default (no TRD check needed), three escape hatches: .skill-active marker, override phrase, DEVFLOW_SKIP_EDIT_GATE=1
Audit log: append-only JSONL at ~/.claude/devflow/audit.log; DEVFLOW_AUDIT_LOG_PATH override for test isolation; route-recommendation marker read from .planning/.route-recommendation
Cutoff numbers for /devflow:quick are advisory (<5 files, <200 LOC, no new abstractions) — exact wording from issue #27, preserved for 16-04 classifier consistency
quick triggers drop tiny/quick-fix/can-you-just — those route to /devflow:micro; workflow.md process steps are unchanged
16-04: Trivial-noun whitelist approach for micro INTENT_MAP entry prevents collision with build/debug/quick
16-04: classifier.cjs case 9 inverted to 4-assertion gate proving Phase B shipped state
gitRunner injection in commitMicro avoids coupling to cmdCommit's loadConfig/isGitIgnored checks that fail in test tmpdir fixtures
.micro-description sidecar for cross-invocation description persistence (skill-active marker has no description field by design)
No Task tool in SKILL.md allowed-tools: micro's value is single-context execution; agent spawn excluded to enforce no-ceremony promise
Time injected as ISO string param in decline-tracker for deterministic test assertions
clearDecline writes {} when last entry removed (avoids TOCTOU race vs file delete)
global-config: forward-compat merge uses {...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...parsed} — user values win; unknown v1.3+ keys survive unchanged
global-config shouldAutoInit uses strict === true, not truthy — guards against string 'true' from hand-edited config
Non-scratch tmpdir via ~/.devflow-test-fixtures/ for Phase C fixtures: macOS os.tmpdir() returns /var/folders/ (scratch prefix) — all non-scratch fixtures must use homedir-relative path
Backdated git commits in fixtures: GIT_AUTHOR_DATE/GIT_COMMITTER_DATE must be on 'git commit' command, not 'git add' — env vars only apply to the process they prefix
isSubstantive=true default preserves 15-01 back-compat without test modification
Mode promotion post-classifySession: hook promotes init-offer to auto-init keeping classifier pure
sync-roadmap runs before gh sync and before final commit in update_roadmap — ensures ROADMAP drift captured in same atomic commit
JSDoc block comments must not contain */ glob patterns — terminates comment early in Node.js parser; use prose description instead
bootstrapObjectiveMd mirrors bootstrapProjectMd return shape { applied, added_fields, path, reason } — consistent contract across all bootstrap helpers
backfillAllObjectives uses sorted fs.readdirSync for cross-platform determinism; per-dir try/catch with errors[] aggregation

Cache-only preview helpers in init.cjs — _buildCheckTodosPreview reads parsed.now array, _buildAwarenessPreview filters current branch from peer.branches; advisories_warnings always emitted as [] for stable JSON shape
